info.title: dataminer-sbom
info.description: This .NET tool allows you to create a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for a given directory. It also allows you to add the SBOM to a package.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Adds the specified SBOM to the DataMiner package.

options.name: --sbom-file
options.description: The SBOM file path.

options.name: --package-file
options.description: The package file path to add the SBOM file to.

options.name: --output
options.description: The output directory to place the package with the SBOM file included.

options.name: --minimum-log-level
options.description: Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a SBOM file for the provided directory.

options.name: --solution-path
options.description: The directory containing the solution or the solution file itself

options.name: --package-name
options.description: The name of the package the SBOM represents. Will default to the solution directory name.

options.name: --package-version
options.description: The version of the package the SBOM represents.

options.name: --package-supplier
options.description: The supplier of the package the SBOM represents.

options.name: --output
options.description: The directory where the SBOM file will be placed.

options.name: --minimum-log-level
options.description: Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: generate-and-add
commands.description: Generates a SBOM file for the provided directory and adds it to the provided package.

options.name: --solution-path
options.description: The directory containing the solution or the solution file itself

options.name: --package-file
options.description: The package file path to add the SBOM file to.

options.name: --package-name
options.description: The name of the package the SBOM represents.

options.name: --package-version
options.description: The version of the package the SBOM represents.

options.name: --package-supplier
options.description: The supplier of the package the SBOM represents.

options.name: --output
options.description: The output directory to place the package with the SBOM file included.

options.name: --minimum-log-level
options.description: Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --minimum-log-level
options.description: Indicates what the minimum log level should be. Default is Information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
